Resource hub

Practical tools for buyers and sellers

Practical guides, worksheets, and real estate resources designed to make decisions feel clearer and more manageable.

Guidance you can come back to

Whether you’re getting ready to buy, preparing to sell, or simply trying to understand the process, these resources are here to help you move forward with more clarity and confidence.

Jump to resources

Featured For buyers For sellers FAQ

Featured resources

A few practical starting points for clients who want a clearer overview of the process.

Buyer guide

The Buying Process

A clear overview of what to expect from search to closing.

Seller guide

Prep to Sell Checklist

A practical checklist to help prepare your home before launch.

Guide

Offer Terms Explained

Understand contingencies, timelines, and what matters most in negotiation.

Worksheet

Selling Timeline Planner

A simple way to map out preparation, listing, escrow, and your next move.

For buyers

Resources for buying with clarity

Guides and tools to help you understand the process, compare options, and make decisions with more confidence.

Guide

The Buying Process

A step-by-step overview from first search to closing day.

Worksheet

Monthly Budget Worksheet

Estimate real monthly ownership costs beyond the mortgage payment.

Checklist

Inspection Day Checklist

A simple guide to what to look for and what to ask during inspections.

For sellers

Resources for selling with intention

Thoughtful tools to help you prepare, price, and plan your move before your home goes live.

Checklist

Prep to Sell Checklist

A room-by-room checklist to prepare your home for photos and showings.

Guide

Pricing Strategy

Learn how pricing influences interest, leverage, and timing.

Worksheet

Selling Timeline Planner

A simple planning tool for preparation, listing, escrow, and your next move.

Common questions

Are these resources free to use?
Yes. They’re meant to be practical tools you can use as you explore buying or selling in San Diego.
Do these replace a consultation?
They’re a helpful starting point, but a conversation allows me to tailor guidance to your goals, timeline, and local market conditions.
Can I reach out even if I’m early in the process?
Absolutely. Many people start by gathering information before they’re ready to move. That’s exactly what this page is for.

Need something more specific?

If you’re looking for guidance tailored to your situation, I’d be happy to help you think through your next step.

Schedule a conversation Start with buyers
